top_signals.title: The massacre America forgot
top_signals.summary: The events of 1919 had largely been erased in the town of Elaine, Arkansas. Now a new generation is documenting the legacy of racial conflict for itself
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with employee of Bank of Eufaula and S N B Bancshares, Inc.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with employee of Bank of Eufaula and S N B Bancshares, Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board announces termination of enforcement action with Jiko Group, Inc.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board announces termination of enforcement action with Jiko Group, Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Simon Schama: The founding fathers and the battle for America’s future
top_signals.summary: In 1776, visions of liberty and justice were fraught with compromise, conflict and contradiction. Today, the founders’ words still shape national identity
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: My fellow American: who should be remembered for the next 250 years?
top_signals.summary: Artists, thinkers and leaders from the US and beyond pick the person they think deserves to be honoured, from Abraham Lincoln to Dorothy Parker

top_signals.title: Francis Fukuyama: The problem of equality
top_signals.summary: We must understand our identity to be fundamentally rooted in a set of ideas, not the racial or ethnic identity of our ancestors

top_signals.title: Yiyun Li: ‘Moby-Dick’ is the Great American Novel of pursuit and destruction
top_signals.summary: Like its country of origin, the book is unabashed, sometimes self-indulgent, often brilliant and never subdued or apologetic
